name: Morning Reflections podcast feed unavailable
message: Podcast RSS feed is unreachable - listeners can't subscribe or refresh. Notify tj.jackson@gmail.com

name: Show website high response time
message: Morning Reflections site response time above 3s - listeners may see slow page loads during Saturday broadcast window.

name: Audio stream server CPU saturation
message: Stream server CPU near saturation - audio quality may degrade during live Saturday broadcast.

name: Podcast episode download spike
message: Unusual download spike - episode may have been picked up by an external aggregator. Monitor bandwidth.

name: Show website disk space low
message: Disk usage high on wgsp-web-01 - archive audio files may need rotation to cold storage.

name: Contact form email delivery failure
message: Listener contact form emails not delivering - check SMTP relay on wgsp-web-01.

name: Podcast feed SSL certificate expiry
message: SSL cert on podcast domain expires within 14 days - renew before Saturday broadcast or listeners get security warnings.

name: Grace Community Church media page unavailable
message: Grace Community Church media page is down - Sunday sermon recordings and meditation links unavailable.
